login.title: Admin Login
login.notAdmin: This account does not have admin access.

matches.title: Matches
matches.deleteConfirm: Delete this match and all of its predictions?
matches.flagHint: ISO code used by flagcdn.com — e.g. mx, us, fr, gb-eng
matches.required: Please fill in all required fields.
matches.empty: No matches yet — add the first Saudi match.

detail.resultWarning: Re-entering the result recomputes the winners and resets the lucky wheel.
detail.name: Name

api.title: World Cup matches — football-data.org
api.empty: No matches found in the API for this filter.
api.error: Could not fetch from the football API.
api.errorRateLimit: API rate limit hit — wait a minute and try again.
api.errorForbidden: API key invalid, or World Cup data not available on the current plan.
api.syncNoScore: No score available from the API yet.
api.syncLive: Match in play — current score loaded. Save after full-time.
api.syncFinished: Full-time score loaded — review and save to confirm.
api.syncError: Failed to fetch the score from the API.

qr.title: QR code for the venue poster
qr.hint: Print this code on the poster — scanning it opens the prediction page.
qr.posterHint: Ready-to-print 2:3 poster (fits A4/A3) with the QR code and Arabic call-to-action.

wheel.respinHint: Previously drawn names are excluded from the wheel.
wheel.noWinners: This match has no winners to draw from.
